comment.body:
i try to minimize the time i spend with these so-called "academic" ppl (not everybody of course).
the real discover-spirit is rare there too. 
i feel very uneasy around these pseudo-intelligentsia ppl of the downtown, who think they know everything about the world and life only bcs they know some latin words...
i like to travel by bus and train, sleep in hostels when I'm traveling somewhere... and on the early morning bus talking with hard working blue-collar ppl is way more fun and interesting, and they know way much more about life than those pseudo-aristocrats

comment.body:
look at this image.
this is the trendline between oct27 and now, its current value is 6756.86
now, the most simplistic way to interpret is ,that any close above the current value will increase the slope of the trendline, reinforcing the bullish trend.
and once the slope broke 0, it should not be broken again. 
and we get a new value every single day.

comment.body:
derivative is simple the slope of a function.
you put an imaginary tangent line onto the surface of the function, slide it, and take its slopeness values as a new function.
the slope is the tangent of the degree it has with the horizont
